title: Correspondence Cartridge
description: SPDX-License-Identifier: MPL-2.0 A per-language correspondence pack for the Nextgen Languages Evangeliser engine. A cartridge declares the FACTS — which Forms instantiate which Concepts, and for each Transition its kind + residue + per-stratum verdicts — that the engine classifies. The vocabulary (kinds, strata, residue shapes) mirrors the Idris2 ABI at src/interface/Abi/Correspondence.idr. We build the engine + this contract; the community authors cartridges.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema (for editor / CI validation).

spdx.description: SPDX licence of THIS cartridge (the cartridge author's own choice; not dictated by the engine).

languages.description: Language slugs this cartridge relates, e.g. ['javascript', 'erlang', 'jtv'].

holds.description: Does the correspondence hold at this stratum?

shape.description: The Echo-fibre grade; mirrors Abi.Carrier.Residue. 'none' = true iso; 'absent-source' = novel; 'absent-target' = vanished.

note.description: What is lost, added, or inverted.

narrative.description: Shame-free narrative. The voice stays celebrate / minimise / better / safety / example.

strata.description: Per-stratum verdicts. The false-friend signature is surface:true AND intention:false.

witness.description: Optional path to a proof/test anchoring this claim (the invariant-path governance front-end) — used where the certifiable math pays.
